# Banking Integration API

**Layer:** Support | **Pattern:** Adapter / Webhook Handler
**BIAN:** FinancialGateway (reference)
**Generated by:** GitHub Copilot – Claude Sonnet 4.6

## Purpose

Adapter that isolates the AP domain from Banking System integration. Sends payment orders, handles inbound confirmations via signed webhooks, and enforces idempotency.

## Endpoints

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| POST | /banking/payment-orders | Send payment order to bank |
| GET | /banking/payment-orders/{orderId} | Query payment status |
| POST | /banking/webhooks/inbound | Receive bank confirmation webhook |

## Integration Details

- **Protocol:** REST/HTTP + Webhooks
- **Auth:** mTLS + API Key
- **Webhook security:** HMAC-SHA256 (X-Banking-Signature header)
- **Idempotency:** X-Idempotency-Key prevents duplicate payments

## Resilience

- Retry: exponential backoff, max 3 attempts, idempotent
- Circuit breaker: opens after 3 failures (60s timeout)
- Webhook deduplication: event_id stored in `webhook_event_log`
